file_insights.changes: Added logsExist() helper function and conditional LiveLogView rendering
key_additions: Conditional LiveLogView instantiation using guard statement
FileManager-based existence checks for logs/stdout.log and logs/stderr.log

patterns_discovered.pattern: Conditional UI rendering based on file existence
patterns_discovered.implementation: Check file existence before adding View to SwiftUI hierarchy
patterns_discovered.benefit: Clean separation of concerns; avoids rendering logs that don't exist

patterns_discovered.implementation: Centralized FileManager calls in dedicated helper function
patterns_discovered.benefit: Reusable logic; single point of modification if log path structure changes

patterns_discovered.pattern: Logical OR for multiple file existence checks
patterns_discovered.benefit: Show logs view if either stdout or stderr logs exist

gotchas_discovered.description: Strings 'logs/stdout.log' and 'logs/stderr.log' are duplicated if used elsewhere
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider extracting to constants in a shared enum/struct

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: No error handling on FileManager operations
gotchas_discovered.description: fileExists() could throw or return false for permission errors
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Add do-catch or permission check if needed in production

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Synchronous file system check on main thread
gotchas_discovered.description: FileManager.fileExists() blocks UI if logs directory is on slow storage
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider async file checks if UI responsiveness becomes issue

approach_outcome.implementation_notes: Successfully integrated LiveLogView into BopCardPreview with conditional rendering based on log file existence. Placed below stage timeline as specified. Used helper function to encapsulate file existence logic.
approach_outcome.integration_point: Below stage timeline section in VStack hierarchy
approach_outcome.conditional_logic: Renders LiveLogView only if cardURL exists AND at least one of stdout.log or stderr.log files exist

recommendations.suggestion: Extract log file paths to constants
recommendations.rationale: Avoids magic strings if log structure is referenced elsewhere

recommendations.suggestion: Cache logsExist() result if called frequently
recommendations.rationale: FileManager.fileExists() calls add overhead; consider memoization during view lifecycle

recommendations.suggestion: Add logging for when log view is/isn't rendered
recommendations.rationale: Helps debug cases where logs exist but aren't shown due to path mismatches
Prevents UI blocking if log directory access is slow (e.g., remote mounts)
